changeSet.author: natali
natali
natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_details ( id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, surname VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, middle_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, birth_date Date NOT NULL, passport_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, identity_number VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, city_birth_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, date_issue Date NOT NULL, date_expiry Date NOT NULL, nationality VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, issuing_authority_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (city_birth_id) REFERENCES cities (id), FOREIGN KEY (issuing_authority_id) REFERENCES issuing_authority (id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_address ( id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, country VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, region VARCHAR(50), locality VARCHAR(50), city_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, street VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, house_number VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, flat_number VARCHAR(10) , phone_number VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (city_id) REFERENCES cities (id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client ( id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, role VARCHAR(10), client_details_id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, client_address_id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (client_details_id) REFERENCES client_details (id), FOREIGN KEY (client_address_id) REFERENCES client_address (id)
);

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS account ( account_id VARCHAR(256), client_id VARCHAR(256), account_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, date_open Date NOT NULL, balance DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (account_id), FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES client(id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS card ( card_id VARCHAR(256) , account_id VARCHAR(256), card_number VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE NOT NULL, cvv VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL, card_status VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, currency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (card_id), FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES account(account_id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transactions ( id VARCHAR(256), card_id_sender VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, card_id_recipient VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (card_id_sender) REFERENCES card(card_id), FOREIGN KEY (card_id_recipient) REFERENCES card(card_id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bankomat_operations ( id VARCHAR(256), card_id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, type_operation VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (card_id) REFERENCES card(card_id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS products_operation ( id VARCHAR(256) , product_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, date_start_operation TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, date_end_operation TIMESTAMP, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, interest_rate DECIMAL(5,2), account_id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES account (account_id) );

changeSet.author: natali
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_info ( id VARCHAR(256) , client_id VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL, date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, bankomat_operation_id VARCHAR(256) , products_operation_id VARCHAR(256), transactions_id VARCHAR(256) , PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES client(id), FOREIGN KEY (bankomat_operation_id ) REFERENCES bankomat_operations (id), FOREIGN KEY (products_operation_id ) REFERENCES products_operation (id), FOREIGN KEY (transactions_id ) REFERENCES Transactions (id) );
